generated_oml:
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Occupancy detector instantiated in the BIM model capturing presence data."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance LightIntensitySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Light intensity sensor instantiated in the BIM model measuring ambient illumination."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightIntensityDataTransmitted
]

instance IndoorEnvironmentalSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Indoor environmental sensor instantiated in the BIM model capturing temperature, humidity, and air quality."
    DTDFVocab:producedData IndoorEnvironmentalDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance LightIntensityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightIntensitySensor
]

instance IndoorEnvironmentalDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IndoorEnvironmentalSensor
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured occupancy status data streamed via Eclipse Hono MQTT gateway."
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance LightIntensityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured light intensity data streamed via Eclipse Hono MQTT gateway."
    DTDFVocab:fromData LightIntensityDataTransmitted
]

instance IndoorEnvironmentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured indoor environmental data (temperature, humidity, CO₂) streamed via Eclipse Hono MQTT gateway."
    DTDFVocab:fromData IndoorEnvironmentalDataTransmitted
]

instance LightingDimmerController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Dimmer controller actuator that adjusts lighting levels based on digital twin commands."
]

instance LightingSwitch : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Switch actuator that toggles lighting fixtures on or off as commanded by the digital twin."
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "HVAC actuator that modifies heating, ventilation, and air‑conditioning schedules per twin instructions."
]

instance BIMIFCModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "IFC BIM model of the Living Lab building enriched with runtime semantics for lighting and building control."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDEToscillatorEnabler
]

instance DittoConfigModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto configuration model generated from the BIM transformation process."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDittoEnabler
]

instance HonoTenantConfigModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono tenant configuration model produced during the model‑to‑text transformation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoEnabler
]

instance DeviceRuntimeModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Runtime representation of devices and control logic compiled from the enriched BIM."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDittoEnabler
]

instance EclipseHonoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono MQTT gateway that receives sensor events and forwards them to the twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringDashboardService, OptimizationService
]

instance EclipseDittoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto device twin service that ingests events and updates the twin state."
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveAnalyticsService, VisualizationService
]

instance MDEToscillatorEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model‑to‑model and model‑to‑text MDE tools that transform the enriched BIM into runtime artifacts."
    DTDFVocab:enables TBD_TransformationService
]

instance UnrealEngine5Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 rendering engine used for immersive 3D visualization of the digital twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance TBD_TransformationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Transformation service that converts the enriched BIM into runtime artifacts for the digital twin."
]

instance MonitoringDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time monitoring dashboard that visualises occupancy and environmental data streams."
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics service that forecasts energy use and visual comfort based on runtime data."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyUseInsight, ComfortInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization routine that schedules lighting and HVAC actions to improve energy efficiency and occupant comfort."
    DTDFVocab:provides LightingScheduleOptimizationAction
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization service that renders the building and its operational status in Unreal Engine 5."
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationAction
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight that displays live occupancy and environmental metrics to facility managers."
]

instance EnergyUseInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight that predicts future energy consumption patterns for the building."
]

instance ComfortInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight that evaluates thermal and visual comfort levels based on sensor data."
]

instance LightingScheduleOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight that proposes optimal lighting schedules to balance energy savings and occupant comfort."
]

instance LightingScheduleOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated action that reprograms lighting dimmers and switches via the twin."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance VisualizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action that updates the 3D immersive view with the latest twin state."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance LivingLabBuilding : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Living Lab building under study, represented by its BIM model and associated twin components."
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands issued by the DT are transmitted via Ditto/Hono endpoints to the building’s control system, driving actuators such as lighting and HVAC."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real‑time data exchange; updates are typically made within milliseconds to seconds, but the document only specifies real‑time operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A service‑oriented architecture integrating BIM semantics, Ditto twin registry, Hono messaging, and visualization services, all orchestrated through a central deployment pipeline with plug‑in extension points."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Design (BIM creation), Manufacture (physical device installation), and Operation (continuous monitoring and control), with the DT evolving across all lifecycle stages via automated MDE transformations."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Use of the ODTE metric to quantify coupling fidelity between the physical building and the DT, along with synchronization checks to mitigate semantic drift."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Bidirectional messaging via Eclipse Hono/Ditto: sensor events are published over Hono, consumed by Ditto twins; control commands are sent from DT to Ditto and then routed to the physical control system."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Standardized integration via Hono and Ditto exposes MQTT and HTTP APIs, allowing the DT to exchange data with external enterprise systems such as CMMS or BMS platforms."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adherence to BIM standards (IFC), model‑driven engineering practices, and standardized integration frameworks (Hono, Ditto) ensures interoperability across tools and stakeholders."
]
